arts.ttl: Rayan Ait Nouri: Man Utd target branded ‘a disgrace’ for post-match scenes
arts.sum: Wolves left-back Rayan Ait Nouri had to be held back by from becoming embroiled in a fight during angry scenes following his side’s 2-1 Premier League loss against Ipswich. Ait Nouri is seen as an ideal player for Amorim’s 3-4-3 system at Old Trafford thanks to the attacking qualities that he brings to Wolverhampton, yet he was slaughtered by fans of the Premier League strugglers following the defeat to Ipswich.

arts.ttl: Ederson: Report Man United studying Atalanta midfielder for January
arts.sum: Atalanta midfielder Ederson continues to be linked with a move to the Premier League, as...

arts.ttl: Why I hope Pep Guardiola halts this current doom spiral and avoids the fate that befell his idol Johan Cruyff, writes RIATH AL-SAMARRAI
arts.sum: RIATH AL-SAMARRAI: Pep Guardiola has been here before. Not as a manager, as we all know by now, but as a player he once stood in the grandest of sporting cathedrals and it crumbled around him.

arts.ttl: Team News: Manchester City vs. Manchester United injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Sunday's Premier League clash between Manchester City and Manchester United.

arts.ttl: Troy Deeney says how he thinks Jack Grealish would do if he signed for Tottenham or Arsenal
arts.sum: Jack Grealish is at a bit of a crossroads in his career right now. The Manchester City ace hasn’t lived up to that £100m pricetag...

arts.ttl: Man United 'given green light in pursuit of La Liga defender' but Ruben Amorim's side may face competition with 'Real Madrid also monitoring £29m-rated star'
arts.sum: Man United have identified a potential long-term candidate to solve their ongoing issues at left back, according to a report.

arts.ttl: Liverpool fans fume as ex-Man Utd star avoids red card before scoring Fulham opener
arts.sum: Liverpool fell behind in their Premier League fixture against Fulham on Saturday after Andreas Pereira scored for the Londoners - minutes after he could have been sent off

arts.ttl: Manchester City brush aside crisis as they prepare for Man Utd with Christmas trip
arts.sum: Manchester City find themselves in a crisis following a run of just one in 10 games and could go into Sunday's derby against United already 11 points behind Premier League leaders Liverpool

arts.ttl: Man City v Man Utd - five talking points on an unusual derby
arts.sum: Manchester United are enduring their worst-ever start to a Premier League season - Manchester City their worst since 2010. BBC Sport looks at five key areas before an unusual Manchester derby on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Former Man City player named president of Georgia
arts.sum: After 17 days of pro-EU protests, a former Manchester City footballer was appointed president.
